creator: v.haisman@sh.cvut.cz
text:
I see the same problem on as described on
<http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?201109230009.58639.dave4431> but on
FreeBSD 8.2.

-- 
VZ

===>  Building for bigreqsproto-1.1.1
